ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Filling (50%) [Water, Quorn Mince (16%) (Mycoprotein, Free Range Egg Albumen, Natural Caramelised Sugar Water, Firming Agents: Calcium Chloride, Calcium Acetate; Barley Malt Extract), Onion, Carrot (3%), Haricot Beans (2%), Natural Flavouring, Rapeseed Oil, Cornflour, Garlic Purée, Tomato Purée, Yeast Extract, Parsley, Malt Extract (Barley), Salt, Thyme, Worcester Sauce (Water, Spirit Vinegar, Sugar, Salt, Tamarind Paste, Onion Powder, Garlic Powder, Ground Cloves, Lemon Juice Concentrate, Ground Ginger, Chilli Powder), Ground Bay], Mash Potato (50%) (Potato, Milk, Butter (Milk), White Pepper).
